replacement_recommended.notes: Title in input was 'Director of Special Services / Early Intervention' but Jason Lords is actually Executive Director of Instruction & Learning at D93 (curriculum/teaching & learning is the right ECE persona for ID). Email inferred from district pattern [last][first_initial]@d93schools.org (64.5% pattern per RocketReach) — confirmed multiple admins use this format.

Scott Ross is Assistant Superintendent of Elementary; designated Federal Programs Compliance Officer (Title I/preschool route). Email pattern at sd273.com is first.last@sd273.com (e.g., kristi.barnhart@sd273.com).
Email confirmed on official district page; also serves as Principal of Orchards Elementary. Idaho's 2025 National Distinguished Principal. Strong fit for early learning curriculum decisions.
Kevin Gifford confirmed as Director of Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment. Inferred via Kuna's primary email pattern flast@kunaschools.org (used 85.5% of the time).
Sandra (Sandy) Miller is the District Curriculum Director at Cassia County School District. Email surfaced via third-party directory.
Kim Lickley listed as Federal Programs Director on Jerome SD website; oversees Title I-A and PreK-aligned funding. Email confirmed.
Angie Martinez confirmed as Director of Curriculum, Teaching & Learning. Inferred from Blaine's flast@blaineschools.org pattern (used ~84.5% of the time).
Angie Godfrey listed as Curriculum Director for Teton SD401. Email inferred from staff pattern flast@d401.k12.id.us (e.g., malles@d401.k12.id.us).

Tiny K-8 elementary-only district in Prairie, ID (Elmore County, NOT Cottonwood). Phone listed in input (208-962-3274) is wrong - that's Cottonwood JSD #242. Correct phone is 208-868-3243; address is 73 Smith Creek Road, Prairie, ID 83647. Historical superintendent was Troy J. Thayne; current superintendent/principal name not surfaced via web search. Recommend direct outreach to district office.

Dr. Shane Johnston named new superintendent August 2024 (per district announcement). However, per Idaho Ed News, he left in 2025 and Shane Matson stepped in with remote assistance from Heather Williams - leadership may be in transition. District email domain @leadoreschool.org confirmed (e.g., kpramsey@leadoreschool.org). Specific email for Johnston not surfaced.

Sandra Miller is current Superintendent (39-year educator) but retiring end of 2025-26 school year; Dr. Scott Root selected as successor effective July 2026. Email format milsandr@cassiaschools.org per ZoomInfo + standard pattern. Given today's date (May 2026), Miller may still be in role or transitioning. Consider routing future outreach to Scott Root.
